title: Normality / digit-statistics dataset + analysis notebooks (CC0)
context: bigger-pi is an open, distributed, verification-first effort to compute more digits of pi on donated compute; the public good is the open, reproducible, independently-verified toolchain, chunk-coordination protocol, and provenance ledger. This backlog task builds a research substrate from already-verified digits: digit-frequency and normality statistics with reproducible notebooks, making no claims beyond what the data supports.
objective: Produce a CC0 digit-statistics/normality dataset and reproducible analysis notebooks derived only from already-verified published digits.
acceptanceCriteria: Computes digit-frequency and normality statistics derived only from already-verified, published digits.
Ships reproducible analysis notebooks and a CC0 dataset; makes no claims beyond what the data supports.
No secrets/PII; all artifacts content-addressed; CC0-1.0.
output: A CC0 digit-statistics dataset with reproducible normality-analysis notebooks.
